title: BetterMC:RPG-Rises
description: Ever wanted to create the Ultimate RPG experience? Turns out you don't have to anymore!
body:
# BetterMC:RPG – Rises

### *“When the world fell silent… the heroes rose.”*

In an age shattered by cataclysm and crawling with creatures unknown, a new world awakens — wild, ancient, and untamed. Forests twist into forgotten kingdoms, deserts hide buried empires, and the sky itself splinters with soaring temples and citadels suspended above the clouds. Villages rebuild on the ruins of a lost age, guarded by brave warriors who watch the horizon for what comes next.

This is a land reborn.
This is **RPG – Rises**.

---

## **🌄 A World Forged in Mystery**

From lush, reimagined landscapes to labyrinthine dungeons carved deep beneath the earth, the world is alive with secrets. Massive structures rise from every corner — ancient towers, cursed strongholds, drifting air ruins, and deserts haunted by forgotten gods.
**Every step forward is a step into legend.**

---

## **⚔️ Become a Hero**

Forge your destiny with a full RPG class system:

* **Wizards**
* **Rogues**
* **Warriors**
* **Archers**
* **Paladins & Priests**

Each shaped by **skill trees**, **abilities**, **relics**, **jewelry**, **runes**, and **unique weapons** discovered across your adventure.

Combat becomes cinematic and intense — **rolls, combos, spells, and weapon mastery** redefine every encounter.

**You don’t just play a role. You become one.**

---

## **🐉 Face Beasts Born of Chaos**

Across the lands, titanic threats stir:

* Eldritch horrors
* Cataclysmic monsters
* Awakened guardians
* Ancient beings forgotten by time

These are not simple enemies —
**they are trials meant to break unworthy heroes**.

Only those who rise above fear will stand victorious.

---

## **🗺️ Lose Yourself**

Sail across treacherous seas.
Fly through the skies in fragile aircraft.
Explore forgotten kingdoms swallowed by nature.
Chart the unknown with enchanted maps.

Waystones, ships, relics, magical tools —
**every discovery is the beginning of a new story.**

---

## **🛠️ A World Built for Legends**

Survival becomes an art:

* Build thriving bases and outposts
* Discover thriving villages and fortified taverns
* Traverse overhauled biomes, structures, and dimensions
* Claim treasures found in colossal handcrafted dungeons

The land is alive —
**and it waits to be claimed by heroes.**

---

## **✨ Rise, Hero**

This is not just another world.
This is a realm forged in ancient magic, wandering beasts, and towering ruins lost to time.

**Your legend begins now.**
Step forward…
**and let the world remember your name.**


# Notes:

1. Make sure to add [Born in Chaos]("https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos/files/7150215")
2. Make sure to check out the rest of my BetterMC series
3. Thanks to OpenAI's Dall-E 3 (used for the Icon)
